title: Decimillipede

moves.title: Reattach
effects: Trigger Reattach power to rejoin the Decimillipede

move_pattern: Starting move is determined by StarterMoveIdx % 3: 0 = Writhe, 1 = Bulk, 2 = Constrict. Normal cycle: Writhe → Constrict → Bulk → Writhe (repeating). When the segment is defeated it plays Dead (does nothing), then must perform Reattach once, then resumes with a random move chosen from Writhe, Bulk, or Constrict (no repeat of the last move).
notes: DecimillipedeSegment is an abstract base class for the individual segments of the Decimillipede boss. Each segment spawns with 25 stacks of Reattach Power. When defeated, the segment enters a Dead state (no action) followed by a Reattach state — the Reattach Power triggers the segment to rejoin the main Decimillipede body (shown as a heal intent). After reattaching, the segment resumes from a random move (Writhe, Bulk, or Constrict). Each segment is assigned a unique even HP value at spawn to distinguish segments from one another; if two segments would share the same max HP, the second is incremented by 2. The StarterMoveIdx property staggers the starting positions in the attack cycle across different segments so they cycle out of sync. Concrete subclasses may define additional moves (e.g. Outgas, Tackle).
